description: Default autonomy policy pack for L0-L5 tool risk gating.

low.reason: Autonomy level L0 blocks all tool execution.

medium.reason: Autonomy level L0 blocks all tool execution.

high.reason: Autonomy level L0 blocks all tool execution.

critical.reason: Autonomy level L0 blocks all tool execution.

low.reason: Autonomy level L1 requires approval for low-risk tool execution.

medium.reason: Autonomy level L1 blocks non-low-risk tool execution.

high.reason: Autonomy level L1 blocks non-low-risk tool execution.

critical.reason: Autonomy level L1 blocks non-low-risk tool execution.

medium.reason: Autonomy level L2 requires approval for medium-risk tool execution.

high.reason: Autonomy level L2 blocks high/critical-risk tool execution.

critical.reason: Autonomy level L2 blocks high/critical-risk tool execution.

high.reason: Autonomy level L3 requires approval for high-risk tool execution.

critical.reason: Autonomy level L3 blocks critical-risk tool execution.

high.reason: Autonomy level L4 requires approval for high-risk tool execution.

critical.reason: Autonomy level L4 requires approval for critical-risk tool execution.
